title: microlicia doryphylla
intro: Microlicia doryphylla, also known as the 'Mangrove Microlicia', is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Microlicia doryphylla include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing. Microlicia doryphylla can be prepared for consumption as a tea, decoction, or infusion, or used topically as a poultice or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
